title: The Starlands Dimension
description: The Starlands a magical dimension with new weapons and armor.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/kE6P5aN8eDM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Welcome to the Starlands!

The Starlands is a dimension full of magic, new items, and structures, so get ready for a new adventure!

![Fighting a battle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0541b19af5ca525fcb59608583f5b21e36cc27ea.png)
# Biomes:

The Starlands adds 6 new biomes:

The Tranquil Forest: a biome with purple leaves, blue grass, and flowers galore

The Open Starlands: The most common biome, containing animals, cosmic trees, and flora

The Starry Plains: A blue grass biome with animals and floral elements

The Healthy Swamp: a green, Overworld-like biome with overgrown grass and leaning trees

The Cursed Starlands: A bright red biome with towering trees and deadly monsters

The Dead Forest: Once a great forest, now a desolate wasteland overrun with undead

![Tower Outlook](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dece8a4eba62b7e0ccfa9325764976af4be39cbb.png)

# Structures

The Starlands adds 13 new structures, always placed a fair distance away from each other, so you will always have something new to explore.

 

# Ores and Items

The Starlands has a great amount of ores and items. Along with an assortment of wands and projectiles, there is also new armor and weapon sets to add to your collection, with 2 new ores to craft with, and Starlands equivalents of every overworld ore, as well as new potions, there's no shortage on things you can do here.

![Mining Lightning fragments](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43eb0096c76bcfbdc94e9963dfe4d90827516019.png)

# Are you ready?

Play the Starlands Today!

![Overlooking Mansion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61c11a0c43d4dd4753ee2c3e39a6c70a224fab9a.png)
